name: EventCreateAttributes
description: The attributes for a new event to be created

title.description: The event title displayed in the Events Explorer (max 100 characters)

message.description: The event body text with additional details about the event (max 4000 characters)

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in seconds for when the event occurred; defaults to current time if not specified

priority.description: The event priority level for filtering and sorting in the Events Explorer

host.description: The hostname to associate with this event for infrastructure correlation

tags.description: List of tags to apply to the event in key:value format for filtering

alert_type.description: The alert type category for visual display in the Events Explorer

aggregation_key.description: An arbitrary string used to group related events into a rollup (max 100 characters)

source_type_name.description: The source technology or integration that generated this event (e.g., aws, chef, nagios)
